component.name: WMaker Dock Config
component.summary: Configure Window Maker dock apps for GNOME Wayland

description.p: WMaker Dock Config is the standalone configuration utility for WMaker Dock. It lets you enable and tune dock app settings for the host-side extension.
Scope note: this Flatpak packages only the standalone config application. The GNOME Shell extension runtime remains host-side and is out of Flatpak scope.
